description: Draft or summary of a legal document describing the boundaries of a property, apparently in an exclusive neighborhood. South: one house known by the name of Kātib Rīḥat(?) al-Qand(?) and another by Ruzzīq al-[...]. North: Dār al-Muṭarriz. East: Burj Bishāra al-Qalʿī. West: the house known by the name of Kātib al-[...].
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
